test.command: .venv-mission/bin/python -m pytest tests/services/test_watch_api_baseline.py tests/services/test_watch_digest_service.py tests/services/test_mini_auth_session_boundary.py -v && npm --prefix mini run test

blockingIssues.description: mini/lib/runtime-config.js swallows broken runtime.local.js loads as if the override file were missing, so a misconfigured operator override silently falls back to the placeholder backend instead of surfacing the local configuration error.

mini/lib/runtime-config.js only rejects a few exact loopback hosts and misses loopback spellings such as 127.0.0.2 and [::1], allowing VAL-PUBLISH-001 and VAL-PUBLISH-006 to be falsely green-lit for loopback-only runtime targets.

mini/lib/shell-navigation.js always calls wx.navigateBack for Account secondary-page returns and never falls back to Account when the leaf page is the current stack root, so Settings/About/Privacy/Help do not guarantee the required round-trip navigation.

Home derives signed-in posture from digestResult.ok instead of session state, so authenticated users with non-401 digest failures or zero-card responses can be shown signed-out copy while Account still shows them as signed in, breaking honest surface-specific messaging.

rejectedObservations.observation: The runtime-config tests do not cover broken runtime.local.js loads or alternate loopback spellings, so both runtime-config bugs escaped the current validator path.
rejectedObservations.reason: feature-specific coverage gap that should be fixed with a follow-up implementation feature rather than a shared-state or guidance update

rejectedObservations.observation: Commit c21dcfa4 registers real Home, Watch, and Account primary surfaces plus the Account leaf pages in mini/app.json.
rejectedObservations.reason: positive implementation evidence only; no shared-state update needed

rejectedObservations.observation: The primary shell surfaces share objective dark-premium tokens and elevated card styling in mini/styles/shell.wxss.
rejectedObservations.reason: positive implementation evidence only; no shared-state update needed

rejectedObservations.observation: Home, Watch, and Account responsibilities are explicitly differentiated in navigation wiring and generated validation proof.
rejectedObservations.reason: positive implementation evidence only; no shared-state update needed

rejectedObservations.observation: Watch stays contract-first by deduping to one compact card per canonical stock_code and rendering only compact mapped fields.
rejectedObservations.reason: positive implementation evidence only; no shared-state update needed

rejectedObservations.observation: The shell proof artifacts still show signed-out navigation and distinct Watch auth/loading/waiting/empty/ready states.
rejectedObservations.reason: positive implementation evidence only; no shared-state update needed

rejectedObservations.observation: Session posture is derived unevenly across Home, Watch, and Account surfaces.
rejectedObservations.reason: captured directly by the blocking Home-state issue and not broad enough on its own to justify a separate shared-state update
